vendor_status.title: OpenAI Status
vendor_status.subtitle: OPENAI INCIDENT STREAM · RSS FOR EVENTS · JSON FOR SYSTEM HEALTH
vendor_status.fetch_failed_hint: RSS is fetched through the desktop runtime bridge. If the feed is unavailable, the page falls back to JSON incident links.
vendor_status.data_source_rss_desc: Top incident card and recent updates come from the official feed.
vendor_status.data_source_json_summary_desc: Live component groups and current degradation come from the summary endpoint.
vendor_status.data_source_component_impacts_desc: Uptime bars are built from the last 90 days of component impact intervals.
vendor_status.hero_no_incident: No active OpenAI incidents were detected from the current RSS feed or the live status summary.
vendor_status.hero_incident_fallback: OpenAI has posted an incident without additional detail in the public feed yet.

session_management.title: Project Sessions
session_management.subtitle_scan: Last scan 2026-04-29 23:41 / usage index partially available / projection cache disposable

status.title: System Status
status.service_key_loaded: Loaded the current relay service API key
status.service_key_missing: No relay service API key is available yet. Enter one and save.
status.service_keys_required: Keep at least one API key.
status.service_keys_save_failed: Failed to update relay service API keys
status.service_keys_hint: One key per line. Saving hot-reloads the relay service.
status.service_key_value_placeholder: Enter sk-... or another relay key
status.apply_local_hint: This merges the selected relay settings into local CODEX_HOME and preserves unrelated existing config where possible.
status.apply_local_missing_key: Select an available API key first.
status.codex_config_hint: Codex needs both auth.json and config.toml. Copying auth.json alone still points Codex at the official OpenAI endpoint.
status.model_name_required: Keep at least one model name.
status.local_cli_codex_hint: Preview and write the minimal patch for CODEX_HOME/auth.json and CODEX_HOME/config.toml
status.local_cli_claude_hint: Preview and write controlled env fields in ~/.claude/settings.json
status.claude_boundary_note: Only patches settings.json env fields. It does not modify ~/.claude.json, MCP, permissions, hooks, or statusLine.
status.claude_conflict_hint: If settings.json already has ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN, writing preserves it and returns a warning.
status.codex_controlled_auth_hint: Merges auth fields and preserves unknown fields
status.codex_controlled_config_hint: Only patches controlled root/provider keys; preserves MCP, profiles, and agents
status.claude_controlled_model_hint: Skipped when the model is empty
status.routing_hint: This shows the relay sidecar's currently effective routing and retry settings.
status.routing_loaded: Loaded the currently effective routing config
status.routing_empty: Failed to read the current routing config
status.routing_switch_preview_model: Switch Preview Model On Quota Exhaustion
status.codex_features_search_placeholder: Search feature key / description / legacy alias

codex_feature_descriptions.unified_exec: Use the single unified PTY-backed exec tool.
codex_feature_descriptions.hooks: Enable Codex lifecycle hooks loaded from hooks.json files.
codex_feature_descriptions.enable_request_compression: Compress request bodies with zstd when sending streaming requests to codex-backend.
codex_feature_descriptions.tool_search: Enable the tool_search tool for apps.
codex_feature_descriptions.unavailable_dummy_tools: Expose placeholder tools for unavailable historical tool calls.
codex_feature_descriptions.tool_suggest: Enable discoverable tool suggestions for apps.
codex_feature_descriptions.in_app_browser: Allow the in-app browser pane in desktop apps.
codex_feature_descriptions.browser_use: Allow Browser Use agent integration in desktop apps.
codex_feature_descriptions.browser_use_external: Allow Browser Use integration with external browsers.
codex_feature_descriptions.image_generation: Allow the model to invoke the built-in image generation tool.
codex_feature_descriptions.skill_mcp_dependency_install: Allow prompting for and installing missing MCP dependencies.
codex_feature_descriptions.guardian_approval: Enable automatic review for approval prompts.
codex_feature_descriptions.tool_call_mcp_elicitation: Route MCP tool approval prompts through the MCP elicitation request path.
codex_feature_descriptions.personality: Enable personality selection in the TUI.
codex_feature_descriptions.fast_mode: Enable Fast mode selection in the TUI and request layer.
codex_feature_descriptions.terminal_resize_reflow: Rebuild Codex-owned transcript scrollback when the terminal width changes.
codex_feature_descriptions.memories: Allow Codex to create new memories from conversations and bring relevant memories into new conversations.
codex_feature_descriptions.external_migration: Show a startup prompt when Codex detects migratable external agent config for this machine or project.
codex_feature_descriptions.goals: Set a persistent goal Codex can continue over time.
codex_feature_descriptions.prevent_idle_sleep: Keep your computer awake while Codex is running a thread.
codex_feature_descriptions.shell_zsh_fork: Route shell tool execution through the zsh exec bridge.
codex_feature_descriptions.code_mode: Enable JavaScript code mode backed by the in-process V8 runtime.
codex_feature_descriptions.code_mode_only: Restrict model-visible tools to code mode entrypoints such as exec and wait.
codex_feature_descriptions.codex_git_commit: Enable git commit attribution guidance via model instructions.
codex_feature_descriptions.runtime_metrics: Enable runtime metrics snapshots via a manual reader.
codex_feature_descriptions.chronicle: Enable the Chronicle sidecar for passive screen-context memories.
codex_feature_descriptions.child_agents_md: Append additional AGENTS.md guidance to user instructions.
codex_feature_descriptions.apply_patch_streaming_events: Stream structured progress while apply_patch input is being generated.
codex_feature_descriptions.exec_permission_approvals: Allow exec tools to request additional permissions while staying sandboxed.
codex_feature_descriptions.enable_fanout: Enable CSV-backed agent job fan-out tools.
codex_feature_descriptions.tool_search_always_defer_mcp_tools: Always defer MCP tools behind tool_search instead of exposing small sets directly.
codex_feature_descriptions.remote_plugin: Enable the internal remote plugin catalog development path.
codex_feature_descriptions.skill_env_var_dependency_prompt: Prompt for missing skill environment variable dependencies.
codex_feature_descriptions.default_mode_request_user_input: Allow request_user_input in Default collaboration mode.
codex_feature_descriptions.realtime_conversation: Enable experimental realtime voice conversation mode in the TUI.
codex_feature_descriptions.remote_control: Connect app-server to the ChatGPT remote control service.
codex_feature_descriptions.workspace_owner_usage_nudge: Enable workspace-specific owner nudge copy and prompts in the TUI.
codex_feature_descriptions.web_search_request: Deprecated live web-search feature flag; use the top-level web_search setting instead.
codex_feature_descriptions.web_search_cached: Deprecated cached web-search feature flag; use the top-level web_search setting instead.
codex_feature_descriptions.use_legacy_landlock: Deprecated Linux Landlock fallback flag retained for compatibility.
codex_feature_descriptions.sqlite: Removed compatibility flag for local SQLite rollout metadata.
codex_feature_descriptions.steer: Removed compatibility flag; Enter-submit behavior is now always enabled.
codex_feature_descriptions.collaboration_modes: Removed compatibility flag; collaboration modes are now always enabled.
codex_feature_descriptions.tui_app_server: Removed compatibility flag; the TUI now always uses the app-server implementation.
codex_feature_descriptions.undo: Removed compatibility flag retained as a no-op for old configs.
codex_feature_descriptions.js_repl: Removed compatibility flag for the deleted JavaScript REPL feature.
codex_feature_descriptions.js_repl_tools_only: Removed compatibility flag for the deleted JavaScript REPL tool-only mode.
codex_feature_descriptions.search_tool: Removed legacy search-tool feature flag kept for backward compatibility.
codex_feature_descriptions.use_linux_sandbox_bwrap: Removed legacy Linux bubblewrap opt-in flag retained as a no-op.
codex_feature_descriptions.request_rule: Removed compatibility flag for exec approval rule requests.
codex_feature_descriptions.experimental_windows_sandbox: Removed compatibility flag for the Windows restricted-token sandbox.
codex_feature_descriptions.elevated_windows_sandbox: Removed compatibility flag for the elevated Windows sandbox pipeline.
codex_feature_descriptions.remote_models: Removed legacy remote models flag kept for backward compatibility.
codex_feature_descriptions.image_detail_original: Removed compatibility flag retained as a no-op for old wrappers.
codex_feature_descriptions.responses_websockets: Removed legacy rollout flag for Responses API WebSocket transport experiments.
codex_feature_descriptions.responses_websockets_v2: Removed legacy rollout flag for Responses API WebSocket transport v2 experiments.
codex_feature_descriptions.codex_hooks: Legacy alias for hooks. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.collab: Legacy alias for multi_agent. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.connectors: Legacy alias for apps. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.enable_experimental_windows_sandbox: Legacy alias for experimental_windows_sandbox. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.experimental_use_freeform_apply_patch: Legacy alias for apply_patch_freeform. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.experimental_use_unified_exec_tool: Legacy alias for unified_exec. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.include_apply_patch_tool: Legacy alias for apply_patch_freeform. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.memory_tool: Legacy alias for memories. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.request_permissions: Legacy alias for exec_permission_approvals. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.telepathy: Legacy alias for chronicle. Prefer the canonical feature key.
codex_feature_descriptions.web_search: Legacy alias for web_search_request. Prefer the canonical feature key.

status.codex_features_unsupported_hint: Non-bool or unsupported local feature. Shown as a read-only hint.
status.codex_features_save_hint: Save previews changes first. Failed saves keep the current draft.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Authorized credential files
accounts.login_chatgpt_pending: ChatGPT login is in progress. Finish authorization in the browser, then return here and wait for sync.
accounts.login_chatgpt_success: The ChatGPT account has been synced into the account pool.
accounts.oauth_dialog_hint_login: Copy or open the login URL below, then finish ChatGPT authorization in the browser.
accounts.oauth_dialog_hint_reauth: Copy or open the login URL below, then finish reauthorizing this account in the browser.
accounts.openai_provider_subtitle: This workspace manages provider configs, not single key assets
accounts.openai_provider_add_hint: Minimum fields: name / base url / api key
accounts.openai_provider_preset_hint: Select a vendor to autofill name / base url and switch the API key placeholder.
accounts.openai_provider_detail_hint: Edit core fields and run provider-level verification here.
accounts.openai_provider_headers_hint: One key-value pair per line, for example: Authorization: Bearer sk-...
accounts.openai_provider_models_fetch_idle: Remote models have not been fetched yet. Local or preset entries are used for now.
accounts.openai_provider_models_fetch_success: Remote model list synced. You can use it for verification or replace the local config.
accounts.openai_provider_empty_hint: Add a provider first, then verify and manage it here.
accounts.openai_provider_test_model_hint: Pick from fetched remote models or type a model name manually.
accounts.rotation_drag_hint: Drag cards to reorder them. The top item gets the highest priority, and OAuth accounts, Codex API keys, and openai-compatible providers all participate in rotation.
accounts.rotation_empty_accounts: No account assets are available for sorting
accounts.rotation_quota_not_tracked: No quota tracking for this asset
accounts.rotation_disabled_hint: Disabled: keeps its position but is skipped by rotation
accounts.paste_auth_file_placeholder: Paste an auth file JSON or copied account card content...
accounts.paste_auth_file_invalid: Content must be a valid JSON.
accounts.search_placeholder: NAME / PROVIDER / EMAIL / FINGERPRINT / BASE URL...
accounts.api_key_value_placeholder: Enter the full API key. It will be shown in plain text in the detail panel after saving.
accounts.api_key_duplicate: This API key asset already exists.
accounts.api_key_local_note: New Codex API keys are saved to backend configuration and rendered in the account pool as masked summaries.
accounts.api_key_masked_notice: The full API key is masked. This panel only shows safe summary fields.
accounts.api_key_plain_notice: The detail panel shows the API key in plain text. Be careful in demos and screen recordings.
accounts.api_key_plain_notice_with_provider: The detail panel shows the {provider} API key in plain text. Be careful in demos and screen recordings.
accounts.configuration_hint: Fill any missing values first, then copy individual fields or the whole config block.
accounts.configuration_missing_with_location: Missing fields: {fields}. Fill them in the input section above before copying the config.
accounts.configuration_ready: All config fields are ready to copy.
accounts.delete_missing_name: Missing auth file name for deletion.
accounts.reauth_pending_global: ChatGPT login is in progress. Finish authorization in the browser, then return here and wait for sync.
accounts.reauth_success: Reauth succeeded and the original account asset has been updated.
accounts.reauth_detail_hint: Launch ChatGPT authorization again and write the fresh login result back into this account.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control Panel / Configuration
settings.text_scale_hint: Instantly affects dense titles, labels, buttons, and helper copy while keeping the default tier visually close to the current release.
settings.update_channel_hint_auto: Self-update reads raw release binaries, not installer packages.
settings.update_channel_hint_native: This macOS build uses a native updater UI. Sparkle handles checking, downloading, and installation.
settings.update_channel_hint_manual: This platform can detect new releases, but installation is handed off to the release page.
settings.apply_update_hint: The app will quit after a successful update. Relaunch to enter the new version.
settings.manual_update_hint: Signed macOS releases avoid in-place bundle patching; install the update from the release page instead.
settings.native_update_hint: After clicking "Check Update", the macOS native update flow takes over. Sparkle decides whether an update is available and how it gets installed.
settings.update_applied: Update applied. The app will quit now.
settings.update_redirected: Opened the release page. Download and install the new version there.
settings.native_update_invoked: The macOS native update flow has been started.
settings.local_usage_refresh_hint: The APP layer runs minute-level incremental refresh on this cadence. H5 reads the APP memory snapshot by default.
settings.local_usage_refresh_failed: Failed to update background refresh interval

debug.title: Debug
debug.subtitle: Request / response trace stream
debug.collapsed_hint: Entry is collapsed. Expand to load the request and response body.
